shopping_style: This person is a curious and detail-oriented shopper who likes to explore various product categories before making a purchase. They tend to browse multiple pages before deciding what to buy.
nudge_strategy: Offer a bundle deal on electronics and office accessories to encourage a purchase.
pain_points: Finding the right product in their desired category can be challenging due to the overwhelming number of options.
recommended_offers: Free shipping on all office accessories

shopping_style: Young Adventurer Explorers are indecisive shoppers who browse extensively but rarely make a purchase, often getting distracted by multiple interests. They value convenience and are likely to purchase from a retailer that offers a seamless online shopping experience.
nudge_strategy: Offer a 'recommended for you' section on the homepage that showcases personalized products based on their browsing history.
pain_points: Young Adventurer Explorers struggle with finding the right product amidst a sea of choices, which can lead to cart abandonment.
recommended_offers: Buy one get one 50% off on select electronics

shopping_style: This individual is a curious and detail-oriented shopper who enjoys browsing through various categories and products. They are likely to research and compare different options before making a purchase.
nudge_strategy: Offer personalized product recommendations based on their browsing history and search queries to increase the likelihood of a purchase.
pain_points: Difficulty in finding relevant products and navigating through the website can lead to frustration and abandonment of the shopping cart.
recommended_offers: 10% discount on first purchase with email sign-up

shopping_style: This individual is a curious and flexible shopper who enjoys browsing through various product categories, often discovering new items and brands. They tend to be drawn to unique and creative products that offer a sense of individuality and self-expression.
nudge_strategy: Offer a curated selection of recommended products based on their browsing history to increase the chances of a sale.
pain_points: A lack of clear product information and navigation on the website may deter them from making a purchase.
recommended_offers: Buy one get one 50% off on select accessories

shopping_style: This shopper is a curious and tech-savvy individual who enjoys exploring various product categories, often engaging with several products before making a purchase. They tend to have long sessions, browsing multiple pages before deciding what to buy.
nudge_strategy: Offer personalized product recommendations based on their browsing history and shopping behavior to increase the chances of conversion.
pain_points: Friction in the checkout process, such as complex shipping options or unclear payment terms, may deter this shopper from completing their purchase.
recommended_offers: Buy one get one 50% off on electronics
